title: Innovative Buttery Mediterranean Christmas Pudding Fritters
description: Buttery and shaggy Mediterranean fritters filled with Christmas pudding, deep-fried to perfection in an iron teppan, Whole30-friendly and perfect for the holiday season
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, and sea salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, melted ghee, lemon zest, and orange zest.
Add the crumbled Christmas pudding to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Heat the iron teppan over medium-high heat and add about 1-2 inches of ghee.
Using a cookie scoop, drop the dough into the hot ghee, making sure not to overcrowd the teppan.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
